title: astragalus scabrifolius
intro: Astragalus scabrifolius, also known as the rough-leaf milk-vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Astragalus scabrifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, extract, or supplement, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
